markdownTwin.azureRegion.markdownDescrip: Azure region for Azure Translator. **Used only when provider is Azure (microsoft).** (e.g. global, japaneast, eastus, eastasia)
markdownTwin.defaultMode.description: Default display mode when translation is toggled on.
markdownTwin.batchSize.description: Number of blocks to translate per batch.
markdownTwin.debounceDelay.description: Delay in seconds before re-translating after document changes (1-10s). Increase to reduce API requests while typing.
markdownTwin.configuration.title: Markdown Twin
